summary: Fully managed Apache Kafka service from Confluent. Provides enterprise-grade Kafka with Schema Registry, ksqlDB, and 200+ Kafka Connect connectors. Handles millions of events per second with configurable retention and exactly-once semantics.
evidence: Confluent Cloud supports 99.99% SLA with auto-scaling clusters
Schema Registry enforces Avro/Protobuf/JSON schema evolution rules
Kafka Connect ecosystem has 200+ connectors for integration

summary: AWS-native real-time data streaming service tightly integrated with the AWS ecosystem (Lambda, Glue, S3, Redshift). On-demand capacity mode scales automatically. Best suited for AWS-centric architectures with serverless processing.
evidence: Kinesis Data Streams on-demand mode scales automatically without shard management
Native integration with Lambda for serverless stream processing
Kinesis Data Firehose delivers to S3/Redshift with built-in transformations
